description_long: This handcart features a robust wooden frame with an open slat design for the load platform, allowing for easy drainage and reduced weight. The cart is equipped with two large, spoked wooden wheels reinforced with metal rims, providing stability and durability for transporting goods. Side rails run along the length of the cart, offering containment for items and preventing them from falling off during movement. A long, straight wooden handle extends from the front, designed for manual pulling or pushing. The overall construction is utilitarian, with visible metal fasteners securing the wooden components. The finish is matte, highlighting the natural wood grain and giving the cart a rustic, traditional appearance suitable for urban or rural settings.
description: A sturdy wooden handcart with open slats, side rails, and two large spoked wheels with metal rims, featuring a long straight handle for manual transport. The design is rustic and functional, ideal for carrying goods.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open slat platform, side rails, and the straight handle extending forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large spoked wheel, the length of the handle, and the full height of the side rails.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open platform, side rails, and the metal-rimmed wheels on either side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the wheel, side rails, and the extended handle.
